reference_librarian_queries.query: Scoped lessons for intake-agent normalizing Azure DevOps work item 5035632 into canonical intake artifacts.
reference_librarian_queries.used_in: Confirmed no scoped prevention rules needed for intake artifact normalization.

decisions_made.decision: Extract acceptance criteria from System.Description AC-prefixed lines.
decisions_made.rationale: The ADO CLI response did not include a dedicated acceptance criteria field, while the description contained three explicit AC lines.

decisions_made.decision: Preserve the runner-supplied code_repo path exactly and record the path ambiguity as an open question.
decisions_made.rationale: Intake must not rewrite runner context speculatively, but downstream stages need visibility into the literal path check.

decisions_made.decision: Record the Order Changed modal as a hard constraint.
decisions_made.rationale: The user supplied this as additional context and marked it mandatory.

issues_encountered: Initial Azure DevOps CLI invocation using --project/--expand was unsupported by the installed extension; retried with the supported work-item show arguments.
The supplied target repo path was not found as a literal local path.
notes: Existing intake artifacts were absent; intake directory was still recreated from scratch to satisfy refresh semantics.
